expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总测量值，[板厚] 是顶板、底板和侧板的厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah Pengukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan material Papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือการวัดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของไม้พื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là Tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu Bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu Bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kina-calculate ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ang kapal ng materyales ng Ningning, Ibaba, at Gilid na Pader, [BackBoardThick] ang kapal ng materyales ng Background Pader. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဖြတ်က်န်းဘုံးလေးတက်ကျဘိုဘို့ပရီး၏အစီအစဉ်ကိုတွက်နေသည်။  {[Width],[Height], [Depth]}သည်စုစုပေါင်းတရားရှိပါတို့၊ {[BoardThick]}သည် ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့် ဘေးဖက်အဖုံးပစ္စည်း၏အထူဖြစ်ပြီး, {[BackBoardThick]} ဟာနောက်ခံအဖုံးပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်အထောက်အထား။ (AI translated,Please check.)
